site.title: Restaurante Bar León · Granada
site.description: Family restaurant in the heart of Granada since 1959. Traditional Andalusian cuisine on Calle Pan, steps from Plaza Nueva.

home.hero_title:
The taste of always,
in the heart of Granada
home.hero_body: Traditional Granadan cooking since 1959, steps from Plaza Nueva.
home.heritage_body: Founded in 1959, Bar León remains a family-run restaurant on Calle Pan, steps from Plaza Nueva in the historic heart of Granada. Generation after generation, the same cooking: simple, honest, Granadan.

features.title: Home cooking
features.body: Tapas, half-portions and full plates made with traditional Andalusian recipes. No fuss, good produce.

features.title: A cofradía institution
features.body: A beloved gathering point during Semana Santa (Holy Week). Brotherhood members and neighbours have been making this their home for generations.

features.title: In the heart of Granada
features.body: C/ Pan 1, next to Plaza Nueva. A step from the Albaicín, the Cathedral and the living pulse of the city.

menu.title: Our menu
menu.subtitle: Traditional Andalusian cuisine
menu.note: Menu subject to change. Please ask at the restaurant for availability.
